positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical crest design featuring interlocking stylized botanical elements (eucalyptus, fern, lavender) framing a central, elegant celestial motif—a crescent moon cradling a five-pointed star. The style should be neo-traditional tattoo art meets elegant vintage etching, rendered in deep sapphire blue, sage green, and metallic antique gold ink tones. The composition must be centered and contained within a printable badge shape, emphasizing strong outlines, clean silhouettes, and high contrast. Use sophisticated cross-hatching and linework for texture. Minimalist background for maximum apparel print versatility. Vector quality, professional merchandise design.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, amateur, grainy, messy
